facilities.name: CBC Learning Classrooms
facilities.desc: Bright, well-resourced classrooms designed around competency-based, hands-on learning.

facilities.name: Science & Discovery Corner
facilities.desc: A dedicated space where learners explore, experiment, and build inquiry skills early.

facilities.name: Reading & Library Nook
facilities.desc: A cosy reading corner stocked with age-appropriate books to build a love for reading.

facilities.name: Playground & Outdoor Play
facilities.desc: Safe, supervised outdoor play areas that support physical and social development.

facilities.name: ICT & Digital Literacy Room
facilities.desc: Age-appropriate digital literacy sessions that prepare learners for a digital world.

facilities.name: Nutrition & Feeding Program
facilities.desc: Balanced, nutritious meals prepared on-site to keep learners healthy and focused.
